title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 12 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 12 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 12 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 12/08/2024
DCE iron ore futures hit a new low, with the market showing weak and volatile performance throughout the day. The most-traded contractI2501 finally closed at 734 yuan/mt, down 1.08% for the day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm for selling; steel mills were cautiously observing, with some planning tenders.
